title: Ophrys holosericea psp. scolopax
taxonomy: Ophrys holosericea psp. scolopax is a subspecies of the orchid species Ophrys holosericea, and it is classified within the family Orchidaceae. This orchid is a member of the genus Ophrys, commonly known as bee orchids, due to their unique flowers that mimic bees to attract pollinators. The classification of Ophrys holosericea psp. scolopax is further refined at the subspecies level, indicating a specific population or geographic variation within the species. As a member of the Orchidaceae family, Ophrys holosericea psp. scolopax is closely related to other orchids, sharing characteristics such as a modified petal structure and a unique reproductive strategy. Overall, the classification of Ophrys holosericea psp. scolopax reflects its evolutionary relationships and distinct features within the orchid family.
